meta.title: Reprint Push Local Edited
meta.description: Pulled local WordPress site after local changes.
meta.author: Reprint Push Lab

steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $shared_id = wp_insert_post(array('import_id'=>1001,'post_title'=>'Shared base post','post_name'=>'shared-base-post','post_content'=>'Local edited content','post_status'=>'publish','post_author'=>1)); add_post_meta($shared_id, 'reprint_push_fixture', 'shared', true); $local_id = wp_insert_post(array('import_id'=>2001,'post_title'=>'Local-only draft','post_name'=>'local-only-draft','post_content'=>'Created locally after pull','post_status'=>'draft','post_author'=>1)); add_post_meta($local_id, 'reprint_push_fixture', 'local-only', true); $dir = WP_CONTENT_DIR . '/uploads/reprint-push'; wp_mkdir_p($dir); file_put_contents($dir . '/shared.txt', 'local upload content'); file_put_contents($dir . '/local-only.txt', 'local-only upload content'); update_option('reprint_push_plugin_payload', array('owner'=>'forms','mode'=>'local-edited','version'=>2));
